title: Herobrine Horror Project
description: The best Minecraft horror plugin for 1.21.4 Spigot that lets you troll your friends or create a YouTube video with scary ambience sounds and horror effects.
body:
Herobrine Horror – Minecraft Plugin
**Perfect to troll your friends**
or 
**make a youtube vidéo**

**You can only be scared if you don't expect it.**

This plugin brings Herobrine to life in your Minecraft world!

Summon Herobrine with a special command :
**/herobrine player**

When summoned, he appears as a villager with a unique name.
He is silent, invincible, and will relentlessly chase the player.
Herobrine moves faster than normal zombies thanks to a speed boost.
A warning message appears when Herobrine is summoned, letting the player know they are being hunted. !

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3432beb2525069bdd33e2f78c76f106af69a3cdb.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b97a950809000efbc7350c72627bfeda56e01bb4.png)

After a little time he will despawn 

In the plugin : 
-Pannel
-Screamer 
-Chat message 
-sond ambience 
-and more !
